arts.ttl: Hull City already have the perfect Championship blueprint for testing Burnley fixture
arts.sum: While City's form is horrendous and ihey're struggling at the bottom end of the league, away from home, Ruben Selles' side have won their last three at Blackburn Rovers, Millwall and Sheffield United, scoring five and without conceding a single goal. We're going to go into that Burnley game believing we could win it," the Colombian midfielder told Hull Live.

arts.ttl: Hull City's Championship relegation chances assessed as Louie Barry transfer claim made
arts.sum: City will hope Barry can rekindle the stunning form which saw him net 15 times in 23 games for Stockport County in the first half of the season, albeit in League One. And Goodman feels the Tigers are stronger than their rivals, the majority of which they still have to play in the final 16 games. Former player turned pundit Don Goodman believes Louie Barry can be the catalyst to spark a recovery from Hull City in the final weeks of the season.

arts.ttl: Hull City's John Egan reflects on short but 'sweet' Burnley spell ahead of Turf Moor return
arts.sum: John Egan is able to reflect positively on his short but “sweet” spell with Burnley, despite his lack of game time.

arts.ttl: Hull City predicted XI for Burnley as Ruben Selles makes John Egan decision
arts.sum: Hull City head coach Ruben Selles faces a tough decision as he looks to return his side to winning ways in one of their most difficult away trips at Burnley. Experienced defender John Egan, who arrived on the final day of the transfer window is pushing for a start against the club he left to join City last Monday, and his arrival into the starting XI could see Sean McLoughlin revert to left-back.
